query: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.minicurriculo, a.quemEVoce, a.bypassOnboarding, a.onboardingLiberado, a.onboardingLiberadoEm, a.isActive, a.canLogin FROM alunos a WHERE LOWER(a.name) LIKE '%elio%' AND a.isActive = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.minicurriculo, a.quemEVoce, a.bypassOnboarding, a.onboardingLiberado, a.onboardingLiberadoEm, a.isActive, a.canLogin FROM alunos a WHERE LOWER(a.name) LIKE '%elio%' AND a.isActive = 1;
